translation_match_note: LibriVox catalog page states 'Translated by Brookes More (1859-1942)' and cites theoi.com as the source text — same edition as data/text.json. High confidence.
pd: LibriVox recordings are public domain (CC0 / public domain dedication).
myth_locator: Echo & Narcissus is the SECOND HALF of Book 3 (lines 3.339-510). Most likely spans metamorphoses_08_ovid.mp3 (into) metamorphoses_09_ovid.mp3. Builder: confirm the exact sub-span by matching the opening line 'Tiresias' fame of prophecy was spread...' against the audio; clip from there to '...the white around the gold.'
builder_steps: Download the Book 3 mp3 part(s) above.
Locate the Narcissus span (starts 'Tiresias' fame of prophecy...').
Clip just that span; run Whisper forced-alignment against data/text.json passage text to get word timings.
Feed word timings into pipeline/assemble_performance.py to build the per-word karaoke overlays.
multi_reader_caveat: metamorphoses_1006_librivox is a multi-reader LibriVox project; voice may change at book boundaries. Verify the reader is continuous across the Narcissus span before alignment.

alternate_recording_do_not_use.reason: Different translation — will NOT word-align to the Brookes More text.
